title: GrayScale Sea Lantern
description: Changes and optimizes Sea lantern to black and white. Perfect for modern/aesthetic builds!
body:
# GrayScale Sea Lantern

## What's this?
This is a resoure pack that changes sea lantern block texture to be black and white instead of teal. Making the block suitable for any case. Aimed at **modern/aesthetic** builds or whenever you need monochrome lighting.


**Other pack(s)**

Pale Oak : https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/grayscale-pale-oak
## Optimization
Vanilla Sea lanterns have a very subtle and barely noticable pulsing animation, this pack removes that. Which may increse **FPS** when used in large quantity. Since its not visible anyway.
## Credits
You may use it, modify it, and include in your own resoure pack. However I would appreciate if you **credit** me and place a link back to this page.
